# DBUI — Setup Instructions
# URL: https://dbuidesign.vercel.app/llms.txt
# For full component API + rules, see: https://dbuidesign.vercel.app/llms-full.txt

> Machine-readable setup for AI assistants. Humans: see https://dbuidesign.vercel.app

## What is DBUI?

DBUI is the Databricks component library — 46 components, 451 icons, 162 design tokens, dark mode, and page shells. Built on shadcn/ui + Base UI + Tailwind CSS v4, reskinned with DuBois design tokens.

---

## First-time install

Run these steps automatically inside the target project directory.

### 1. Clone the DBUI repo (if not already present)

```bash
if [ ! -d "$HOME/dbui" ]; then
  git clone https://github.com/muditmittal/dbui.git ~/dbui
  cd ~/dbui && yarn install
fi
```

### 2. Copy the AI rules file

```bash
cp ~/dbui/packages/dbui/CLAUDE.md ./CLAUDE.md
```

This teaches Claude to use ONLY DBUI components — correct imports, semantic tokens, proper icons. Read this file for the full rules.

### 3. Set up path aliases

Add to the project's `tsconfig.json`:

```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "paths": {
      "dbui/*": ["~/dbui/packages/dbui/src/*"],
      "dbui-shells/*": ["~/dbui/packages/dbui-shells/src/*"]
    }
  }
}
```

If using webpack/vite/next, also add resolve aliases in the bundler config pointing to the same paths.

### 4. Import CSS tokens

In the project's root CSS file:

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "dbui/tokens/globals.css";
```

### 5. Install peer dependencies

```bash
npm install react react-dom @base-ui/react class-variance-authority clsx tailwindcss
```

### 6. Start building — every page starts with Base

```tsx
import { Base } from "dbui-shells"

<Base defaultActive="catalog">
  <YourPageContent />
</Base>
```

The Base shell provides: Platform Header, sidebar nav, content surface, and Genie assistant panel.

---

## Update an existing install

```bash
cd ~/dbui && git pull && yarn install
cp ~/dbui/packages/dbui/CLAUDE.md ./CLAUDE.md
```

All projects referencing ~/dbui pick up component changes immediately. Re-copy CLAUDE.md in case rules changed.

---

## Requirements

- Node.js 18+
- React 18+
- Tailwind CSS v4+

## Resources

- Storybook: https://dbuidesign.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/muditmittal/dbui
- Full AI reference: https://dbuidesign.vercel.app/llms-full.txt
- Issues: https://github.com/muditmittal/dbui/issues
